name: sage-zendesk-qa
description: Evidence-grounded Zendesk Q&A for Scaled Customer Success.

interface.shortDescription: Grounded Zendesk answers for customer success
interface.longDescription: Internal pilot for researching Zendesk product, configuration, plan, workflow, and troubleshooting questions through Z2, official Zendesk web sources, Unleash, and Slack.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this Zendesk feature is available on the customer's plan.
Investigate this Zendesk issue using public and internal evidence.
Analyze this customer email and brief me before drafting a reply.
